ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the products table */,
  "international_size" TEXT /* International size (e.g., 3XS, XXS) */,
  "it_size" INTEGER /* Size in Italy (IT) */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* Size in the European Union (EU) */,
  "fr_size" INTEGER /* Size in France (FR) */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* Size in the United Kingdom (UK) */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Product category (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Product subcategory (e.g., shirts, pants, skirts) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Size type (e.g., numerical, alphabetical) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Size description (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Product name */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Product category (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Product subcategory (e.g., shirts, pants, skirts) */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Product description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the products table */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the size_conversions table */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in stock */,
  "quantity_on_order" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product currently on order */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the products table */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the size_conversions table */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Region name (e.g., International, IT, EU, FR, UK) */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Region description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP) */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Currency symbol (e.g., $, €, £) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code (e.g., en, fr, es) */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Language name (e.g., English, French, Spanish) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., admin, manager, sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Role name (e.g., admin, manager, sales) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Role description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Permission name (e.g., create, read, update, delete) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Permission description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
